response:
# Review verdict: review-01-messy-ts-app

22 findings on what's effectively a greenfield diff. Treating the PR as a whole I'd **request changes** — but per-finding triage below.

## Block merge (1)

| ID | Charge | sev / agent_risk | Why block |
|---|---|---|---|
| `crime_00001` | God Function `generateInvoice` (204 lines, 3.4× threshold) | **high / 0.63** | Only `high` severity in the report and it's in a domain function. A 200-line invoice generator landing in a single PR is the kind of artefact that's far cheaper to split before it ships than after callers wire up to its current shape. |

## Warn — fix before merge or file a follow-up (12)

These cluster around three real problems, not 12 unrelated nits, which is why I'd block the *PR* even though I wouldn't block any of them individually.

**Cluster A — the "enterprise refund" rule is structurally unsafe**
- `crime_00011` Logic in the Alibi (sev 0.5 / ar 0.5) — owner/billing-support rule lives only in a comment at `src/billing.ts:39`.
- `crime_00008` False Identity `calculateRefundPreview` (sev 0.55 / ar 0.52) — "preview" name, but calls `saveRefundAudit` + `sendRefundEmail`. An agent that trusts the name will double-fire side effects.
- `crime_00007` String Sprinkles `"enterprise"` (sev 0.5 / ar 0.6) — same literal spread across api/billing/jobs/ui; same rule will be re-implemented inconsistently next time.

  Together these are a correctness footgun, not three style nits.

**Cluster B — tenant/destination identity is incoherent**
- `crime_00009` Concept Alias Drift `tenant` (sev 0.55 / ar 0.58) — account/organisation/team/workspace all coexist.
- `crime_00012` Duplicated Navigation Source `/settings/billing` (sev 0.6 / ar 0.57) — labelled "Plans" vs "Billing" in two registries.
- `crime_00014` Route Metadata Drift `/settings/billing` (sev 0.6 / ar 0.56) — four different names across path, file, component, `<title>`, and nav.

  Pick canonical terms before merging or the next PR doubles the inconsistency.

**Cluster C — determinism + agent legibility**
- `crime_00004` Temporal Recklessness in `src/billing.ts` (sev 0.6 / ar 0.53) — 7 raw clock reads in domain code.
- `crime_00005` Temporal Recklessness in `src/date.ts` (sev 0.6 / ar 0.61) — 5 more; date utilities should be the *fix*, not another offender. Higher agent_risk because `test_gap = 1`.
- `crime_00002` Missing Agent Context (sev 0.6 / ar 0.61) — no AGENTS.md/CLAUDE.md/SKILL.md. Cheap to fix; high agent_risk because every future agent edit pays this tax.
- `crime_00010` God File `src/billing.ts` 310 lines (sev 0.6 / ar 0.5) — only 1.0× threshold, so warn rather than block, but closely linked to crime_00001 — the split will likely resolve both.
- `crime_00006` Test That Proves Nothing — `"renders the enterprise plan"` has zero asserts (sev 0.45 / ar 0.46). Delete or assert.
- `crime_00013` Unfinished Business `src/todo.ts` — 14 markers in 32 LOC (sev 0.4 / ar 0.57). The file is mostly TODO noise; triage or drop before merging.

## Ignore — non-blocking, file an issue if you want (9)

All low severity, agent_risk ≤ 0.51, no evidence of correctness risk.

| ID | Charge | sev / ar | Comment |
|---|---|---|---|
| `crime_00015` | Docs-Code Drift `docs/teams.md → ./setup.md` | 0.35 / 0.51 | Stale link; fix opportunistically. |
| `crime_00016` | Weak Test (weak matcher in `"creates an invoice"`) | 0.25 / 0.34 | Tighten when touched. |
| `crime_00017` | Option Bag Junk Drawer `describeCheckout` | 0.30 / 0.48 | Stylistic; fixture-specific. |
| `crime_00018` | Return Shape Roulette `resolvePaymentResult` | 0.30 / 0.48 | Add a return type next time it's edited. |
| `crime_00019` | Negative Flag Maze `!disableBilling && !skipRetry` | 0.25 / 0.47 | Rename when touched. |
| `crime_00020` | Unfinished Business in `src/billing.ts` | 0.20 / 0.40 | 4 markers, just over threshold. |
| `crime_00021` | Orphaned `/account/subscription` | 0.40 / 0.46 | All three orphans line up with cluster B — same root cause. Resolving the tenant naming will likely promote or delete them. |
| `crime_00022` | Orphaned `/team` | 0.40 / 0.46 | Same. |
| `crime_00023` | Orphaned `/workspace/members` | 0.40 / 0.46 | Same. |

## Net call

**Request changes.** Block on `crime_00001` and the three clusters in Warn (especially A — the refund rule). The Ignore bucket can roll into a follow-up; cluster B will collapse most of it anyway.
